title: VG UI-RUNTIME-CONTRACT (v1) — runtime acceptance criteria for UI-heavy phases
description: Schema for the JSON code block embedded in UI-RUNTIME-CONTRACT.md. Emitted by /vg:blueprint step 2b6d_ui_runtime_contract when phase is UI-heavy (web-fullstack / web-frontend-only profile + ≥1 FE task touching .tsx/.jsx/.vue/.svelte). Consumed by /vg:build pre-test-gate (CSS-token presence + spec-count) and /vg:review (computed-style + env-host checks). Closes Issue #173 root cause: UI-heavy phases passed build/review with Tailwind token drift and missing Playwright lifecycle specs because no contract listed the runtime invariants the design demanded.

phase_id.description: Phase id this contract belongs to.

class_name.description: Tailwind utility class name (e.g. 'brand-primary', 'bg-brand-500'). Must appear in generated CSS at build time.

evidence_source.description: Where the class was discovered (e.g. 'UI-SPEC/sites.md verbatim form markup', 'VIEW-COMPONENTS.md TopBar component').

occurrences.description: How many distinct sites used the class.

required_tailwind_tokens.description: Brand/theme tokens that MUST appear in compiled CSS. Build validator greps generated CSS for each class_name; missing classes block build.

surface_name.description: Canonical surface name from VIEW-COMPONENTS.md (e.g. AppShell, Sidebar, TopBar, MainContent).

computed_style_assertions.description: Optional computed-style invariants Playwright will assert at runtime.

first_viewport_surfaces.description: Surfaces rendered on first viewport (above the fold). Review computed-style smoke targets these per slug.

source.description: Where the route was discovered (PLAN task, UI-SPEC slug, etc.).

route_inventory.description: All routes the phase introduces. Review hard-blocks if a discovered route is absent here, or vice-versa.

status.description: present = ENV-CONTRACT.md consumed; missing = legacy phase, gate downgraded; skipped = phase opted out via override.

env_contract.description: Distilled env-contract surface for downstream review env-preflight + ENV_MISMATCH classification (#173 Stage 1 introduced the matrix status).

count.description: Minimum number of Playwright/lifecycle specs the phase must ship at /vg:build close. Derived from goal_type=mutation goals in TEST-GOALS.md (one spec per mutation goal at minimum).

acceptance_criteria.description: Human-readable acceptance bullets composed from above. Surfaced in /vg:build BUILD-LOG + /vg:review GOAL-COVERAGE-MATRIX as the runtime contract operators sign off against.

skip_reason.description: Set when generator decided to skip (no FE tasks, legacy phase, etc.). When set, the contract exists as a stub with empty arrays + skip_reason populated.
